response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content and confirmed Ninomae Ina'nis is performing. 2. Identified lyrics from the performance: 'Watashi no mono, sou watashi no mono'. 3. Searched for song lyrics and identified the song as 'Sennou' (洗脳) by RADWIMPS. 4. Extracted full lyrics in Japanese and translated them into English. 5. Mapped the scenes (intro, song, outro) and constructed the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance video featuring VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis performing the song 'Sennou' (洗脳) originally by RADWIMPS. The video begins with an intro followed by the performance and a brief outro.

scenes.description: Introductory scene with visual buildup and the performer posing. No vocal music is present.
Full performance of 'Sennou' by Ninomae Ina'nis. The performance features complex 3D stage effects and choreography.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なぁ 俺が病気だって言える根拠なんかあんのかい
別に あんた喜ばすために産まれてきたんじゃない
あんたとてそうでしょう 臭いものに蓋しよう
信じたいものだけを信じて きたんでしょう？
小と中と高で必死こいて 手にいれた
邪見と偏見と穿ったその思考を
取り払うのにもひと苦労
さぁ今日からはどうしよう
あぁちくしょう 有象無象
もう騙されやしないぞ
あんたがたどこさ 庇護さ どこ贔屓かってんで
えっさほいさ生きた結果
これじゃ仕方ないし 味気ないし
いざって時は使えない
君のように 何気なく 『自由』に僕も飼われたい
見えてるものより見えないもの
知ってることより知らないことの方が多いとは言うが
そりゃどうだろうか
もう疑うことばかり うまくなっても
信じたっていいでしょう？
違ってたって何なの？
だからっていいことがあるわけじゃないんだし
幸か不幸かどうかは 僕に決めさせてよ
他は好き勝手 決めさせてやってるんだからさ

僕が怖いのかい なんで泣くんだい理解ができない？
それは僕も一緒さ「目を覚ましてよ」
何を言ってんの？
一語一句違わず その気持ちも一緒さ
何も違わないんだ僕ら
そうだ、泣くことなんてないんだ
だから ママ顔上げて さぁ笑ってや
「幸せになってくれさえすればいいって」さ
言ってた 今僕は言うよ
心からハッピー ハッピー ハッピー ハッピー
産まれ変わったのであります
これぞ真の姿なのです
今までの時間とは あなた様に巡り会うためのものだったのです
わかります わかるのであります
あなたの偉大さを 巨大さを理解できる頭脳を与えてくださったことを
ただただここに感謝いたします
家族にも話しました ダメでした
はみ出したのは僕の方だなんて言われて
僕は我を忘れて殴りました
殴り続けました
そしたらついに母は動かなくなったのです
あなた様の敵は私の敵であるのです
たとえそれが血の繋がった肉親であろうと
許すわけにはいかないのです

ハナっから 自分に○を 僕に×をつけてさ
頭ごなしに 振りかざした その君の正義の
薄いこと 寒いこと 鼻で笑ってしまうよ
もう君じゃないよ
『君の幸』の定義決めた奴は そう
見えてるものより見えないもの
知ってることより知らないことの方が多いとは言うが
そりゃどうだろうか
もう疑うことばかり うまくなっても
信じたっていいでしょう？
違ってたって何なの？
だからっていいことがあるわけじゃないんだし
幸か不幸かどうかは 僕に決めさせてよ
他は好き勝手 決めさせてやってるんだからさ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, is there any proof to say I'm sick?
I wasn't born just to please you,
And it's the same for you, isn't it?
Let's cover up the stinky things,
You've only believed in what you wanted to believe, haven't you?
From elementary to high school, desperately acquiring
The prejudices and distorted thoughts in that mind of yours,
Even undoing that is a chore.
Now, what shall I do from today?
Ah, damn it, the motley crowd,
I won't be fooled anymore.
Where do you stand, who do you protect, who do you favor?
As a result of living like that,
This is inevitable, it's lackluster,
And I can't even use it when it matters.
I want to be kept 'free' just like you, nonchalantly.
More than what is visible, what is invisible,
More than what is known, what is unknown,
It is said there is more of the latter, but what about that?
Even if I get good at doubting, it's okay to believe, isn't it?
Even if I was wrong, what of it?
It doesn't mean there's something good because of that.
Whether it's happiness or unhappiness, let me decide.
I'm letting you decide everything else as you please, so.
Are you afraid of me? Why are you crying? Can't you understand?
That's the same for me too.
'Wake up,' what are you saying?
Without a single word of difference, that feeling is also the same.
Nothing is different, we are.
That's right, there's no need to cry.
So Mama, lift your face.
Come on, smile.
'As long as you become happy, that's fine,'
You were saying that, and now I say it from my heart.
Happy, happy, happy, happy.
I have been reborn.
This is the true form.
The time until now was just to meet you.
I understand, I understand.
I'm just grateful here for the brain you gave me,
To understand your greatness, your enormity.
I told my family too, but it was no good.
'The one who didn't fit in is you,' they said.
I lost my senses and I hit them.
I kept on hitting them.
And then, finally, Mother stopped moving.
Your enemy is my enemy.
Even if it's my own flesh and blood,
I cannot forgive them.
From the start, you gave yourself a 'circle' and me an 'X'.
That justice of yours, which you asserted without thinking,
How thin it is, how cold it is,
I can't help but laugh through my nose.
You're no longer you.
The one who decided the definition of 'your happiness' is that.
Yes, more than what is visible, what is invisible,
More than what is known, what is unknown,
It is said there is more of the latter, but what about that?
Even if I get good at doubting, it's okay to believe, isn't it?
Even if I was wrong, what of it?
It doesn't mean there's something good because of that.
Whether it's happiness or unhappiness, let me decide.
I'm letting you decide everything else as you please, so.

scenes.description: Outro/transition scene after the performance concludes. No vocal music is present.
